description_long: This object is a classic military-style rifle with a dark metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden stock and pistol grip. The rifle features a long, slender barrel with a front sight post and a rear sight mounted on the receiver. The magazine is curved and detachable, made of metal, and positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The wooden stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, providing a solid shoulder rest, while the wooden pistol grip offers a secure hold. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a matte finish on the metal parts. The rifle's construction suggests durability and reliability, suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A military-style rifle with a dark metal body, wooden stock, and curved detachable magazine. It features exposed mechanical parts and a utilitarian, robust design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the barrel end, showing a narrow profile with the front sight post visible.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the stock end, showing the wooden butt and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the wooden stock, pistol grip, magazine, and the details of the receiver and barrel.
